PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Per::onnel and Traininid NOTIFICATION Netv Delhi. the 7111 Int:, 1994 G.S.R. 564(E).—ht exercise of the powers conferred by clause (d). :et and (T) of sub-section (2) of section 35 and clause (c) of section 36 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 19851. the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Prefecture) Hales. 1987. namely :- 1. III These ntle, may be called the Central Athninistral vo Tribunal (Procedure) Ain•ndraent Rules. 1994. (2, They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Ciaactte. -- 2 of 3 -- lint 11—mr1 3(1n ITItl TT 7.T.TW 3 2. In the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1987. for rule 21, the following rule shall be substituted, namely :- "21. Publication of orders : (i) The Tribunal may publish its decisions which are deemed fit for publication, in a report entiiiled" Indian Law Report—Cen- tral Administrative Tribunal-19—(for short ILR—CAT-19— (ii) Such of the orders of the Tribunal, as are deemed fit for publication in any other authoritative report or the press, may be released for such oubli- caiion on such terms and conditions as the Chairman may specify by general or special order " [No. A. 11013:49;92-AT1 SARITA PRASAD, It. Secy. Toot note :—Thc Principal Rules were published in the Gazette of India vide GSR 17(E), dated 6-1-1987 and subsequently amended vide — (i) No. GSR 10001.E), dated 11-10-1988.
